title: v0.1.26
summary: Release 0.1.26 includes 8 new features, 25 enhancements, 7 bug fixes.

sections.label: New Features
items: Add manual scan trigger button to Value Screener
Add calendar date+time picker to Activity Log filters
Add yfinance retry/error handling, timezone-aware scanner, and date formatting
Add Wheel options strategy (Phase 3)
Add multi-index support to Value Screener
Add column header tooltips and Value Screener user guide
Add scanner startup logging and reduce initial delay
Add Value Screener with background S&P 500 scanner

sections.label: Bug Fixes
items: Fix TypeScript errors in DatePicker onChange handlers
Improve scanner resilience and fix screener rank/limit bugs
Replace Vite favicon with Investron logo and fix tab title
Fix null safety crashes on research components + update trading docs
Fix unused Pause import that breaks Vercel build
Remove unused formatMarketCap to fix Vercel build
Fix scanner startup: read async_session_factory at call time

sections.label: Enhancements
items: Fixes release notes and version history
Fixes implied volatility alpaca attribute
Updates wheel to use filings
Fixes infinity issue in value scranner
Merge main into dev: pick up release notes from v0.1.1
Updates to value screener
Fixes for screener issues
Improves search on landing page for search bar, watchlist, and value screener (new)
Auto-run schema migrations on app startup
Poll scanner status faster while scan is running
Hide stale company count while scanner is running
Skip startup scan if last scan completed recently
Phase 2 plus RAG for trading
Modernizes scroll bars for AI Analysis
Adds current_date var for LLM
Updates User Guide and numbering
Adds RAG for AI Analysis
Fixes JWT Auth
Fixes 401 auth issue with AI Analysis service
AI Analysis tool and Local Dev Readme
Infinite scroll on Value Screener
Freezes ValueScreen headers for scrolling and fixes tool tip issue there
Configure root logger so app log messages appear in Railway
Updates Dockerfile and release notes integration
Updates Dockerfile and release notes integration
